golden_law: Observe and report may run automatically; sacred and commercial truth stay human-gated. AI may keep the road clean; it does not choose the destination alone.
summary: Z-Autonomous Guardian Loop defines safe background reflexes (evidence, scans, reports) versus lanes that require AMK/human or charter.

L0.name: Observe
L0.description: Read-only scans: files, configs, reports, drift counts. No writes to source truth.
examples: diff inspection tools in read-only mode

L1.name: Report
L1.description: Emit JSON/MD status artifacts under controlled paths. Does not change product behavior.

L2.name: Safe hygiene
L2.description: Formatting and lint autofix that does not alter semantics (markdown tables, whitespace). Never silent on main without policy.

L3.name: Patch suggestion
L3.description: Produce diffs, plans, or branch proposals. No merge, no push, no apply without human.

L4.name: Controlled apply
L4.description: Small scoped edits (docs, scripts, UI) after explicit lane open; Turtle Mode one domain per change set.

L5.name: Sacred / charter-only
L5.description: Deploy, billing, live bridges, provider secrets, cross-project memory, production auth.

allowed_automatic_evidence_tasks.notes: Lint pass/fail is evidence; fixing is L2 when explicitly run.
Read-only similarity report.
Dashboard registry coherence check.
Parse/validate cross-project JSON; no live bridge.
Aggregates evidence; advisory signals GREEN/YELLOW/RED/BLUE.
Z-AMK-GTAI-1 read-only strategy council rollup across existing report JSON; writes strategy report; exit 1 only on overall RED; not execution.
Z-SWARM-14DRP-1 governance validator for universal swarm law + role registry; classifier/report only, no runtime execution.
Z-IDE-FUSION-1 read-only coordination report for shared IDE session/handoff posture; no remote IDE control or execution.
Z-SEC-TRIPLECHECK-1 communication flow and safety drift audit; report-only, no execution.
Z-LOGICAL-BRAINS-HUB-1 reference-only capsule validator; report-only, no runtime bridge.
Z-NUMEN-HUB-1 reference-only Labs module validator; report-only, no runtime bridge, no execution.
Z-MOD-DIST-1 read-only routing advisor; classifies samples against routing registry; reports only — not execution or auto-merge.
Z-XBUS-GATE-1 read-only external connector registry + policy validator; classifies fixtures; Phase 1 forbids live API/provider/payment/webhook/customer-data execution.
Z-REPLICA-FABRIC-1 governed OMNAI replica doctrine validator; classifies advisory missions; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; no runtime replication or autonomous agents.
Z-ULTRA-MAGE-1 formula governance codex validator; classifies advisory samples; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; no runtime formula engine or live connectors.

Z-MU-TRUTH-1 Mauritius civic truth engine validator; classifies claim ledger rows; peaceful civic scope only; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; no protest coordination, scraping, payments, or deployment.
Z-MU-ADVISOR-1 civic knowledge advisor framework validator; templates + samples only; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; no live AI provider, public chat, user memory, or PII collection.

Z-PATTERN-SAFE-1 pattern literacy and simulation governance validator; domain registry + classified samples only; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; no live prediction engine, wagering instruction export, payments, or connectors.

AMK-AI-SYNC-1 indicator drift observer + Z-AI team router; reads indicators/package/reports only; emits decision packets; exit 1 only on RED; Phase 1 does not mutate amk_project_indicators.json from the validator.

Z-AI-FUSION-MAP-1 overlap governance classifier; pairwise capability scoring + fusion recommendations only; writes reports; exit 1 only on RED; forbids interpreting recommendations as sacred approval or silent merges.

Z-STILLNESS-LEARN-1 stillness learning registry + sample classifier; writes reports only; exit 1 only on overall RED; no background learning daemons, cron stillness, provider calls, self-upgrade, or autonomous execution.

Z-LEGAL-OPS-1 proof-first legal workstation validator; concept/docs/policy/report only; exit 1 only on overall RED; no legal advice runtime, lawyer impersonation, named endorsement without consent, client-data intake, upload, filing, email, provider call, payment, or deploy lane.

Z-LEGAL-PRODUCT-OPS-1 legal/product/IP workstation validator; concept/docs/policy/report only; exit 1 only on overall RED; no product launch, manufacturing commitment, supplier API call, payment activation, medical/certification/public IP registration claim, tracking/surveillance map, or deploy lane.

Z-LEGAL-WORKSTATION-STACK-1 full lawyer workstation requirements validator; governance/report only; exit 1 only on overall RED; no legal runtime authority, live client intake, court filing automation, dispatch automation, deploy, or surveillance.
Z-SSWS-COCKPIT-1 cockpit vs deep-work registry check; merges IDE PATH + fusion mirrors; emits dry-run open plan text only — not execution or auto-launch.
Z-CADENCE-1 allowlisted read-only cadence runner for Logical Brains hub monitoring and follow-up metadata.
Z-AWARE-1 read-only ecosystem registry + capsule aggregation; writes reports; exit 1 only on overall RED; not execution.
Z-API-SPINE-1 read-only API power cell registry validation; writes reports; exit 1 only on overall RED; not execution or live probes unless explicit --with-health-probe on loopback.
Phase 1 readiness charter: lists smoke/readiness command strings from spine registry only; does not execute them.
Z-SSWS-LINK-1 read-only workspace launch requirements registry validation; writes reports; exit 1 only on overall RED; does not install extensions, start servers, or run launch commands.
Read-only OMNAI translation and creative pipeline template validator; no provider calls.
Read-only build plan and review-bundle report from workbench + templates; not execution.
Read-only movie trailer review bundle report; no media generation or publishing.
Read-only master media concept seed report; no provider or media generation.
Read-only media pipeline letter A–E readiness report; not execution.
Coverage audit artifact; part of deeper packs when run.
Regenerates many docs; treat as opt-in deep hygiene, not continuous background default.

optional_project_evidence.notes: Project-local; advisory unless release gate says otherwise.

traffic_signal_alignment.BLUE: Hints matching governance-sensitive lanes require AMK/human decision even when L0–L1 checks pass.
traffic_signal_alignment.RED: Required evidence failed; do not open lane until green.

future_automation_ladder: ZAG-1: doctrine and policy metadata only (this file)
ZAG-2: read-only loop script invoked manually
ZAG-7: chartered live automation for selected safe tasks only
